entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop being studied for seed dormancy and productivity.

entities.name: FRESH SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: The ability of seeds to remain dormant for a period after harvest to prevent premature sprouting.

entities.name: IN SITU GERMINATION
entities.description: The undesirable trait where seeds germinate while still in the pod in the field.

entities.name: PRE-HARVEST SPROUTING
entities.description: Another term for in situ germination, leading to production losses.

entities.name: HUMID WEATHER
entities.description: Environmental condition that coincides with harvest and promotes pre-harvest sprouting.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Fungal contamination that increases when seeds sprout pre-harvest.

entities.name: KERNEL YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced, which is negatively impacted by pre-harvest sprouting.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A desired trait in groundnut cultivars to optimize harvest timing.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT MINI-CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A curated set of groundnut accessions representing broad genetic diversity.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of different genetic characteristics within the groundnut mini-core collection.

entities.name: IN VITRO GERMINATION ASSAY
entities.description: A laboratory-based test used to evaluate the dormancy of seeds.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where the research was conducted.

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The city in India where the ICRISAT research facility is located.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Conventional crop improvement methods based on phenotypic selection.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses molecular markers to select for specific traits.

entities.name: MOLECULAR SCREENING
entities.description: The process of analyzing DNA to identify the presence of specific markers.

entities.name: GMFSD1
entities.description: An allele-specific molecular marker validated for identifying fresh seed dormancy.

entities.name: DONOR ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Specific groundnut accessions identified as sources of the fresh seed dormancy trait.

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: The overall quality of the seeds, which is improved by preventing pre-harvest sprouting.
